• 제목: Single-Instance Sampling for Computationally Efficient and Accurate Real-Time Task Space MPPI Control
  • 저자: Dongwhan Kim^, Euncheol Im^, Yujin Kim, Myo-Taeg Lim, Yisoo Lee^\dagger dongwhan kim and euncheol im are co-first author

  • 저널: Transaction on Robotics (2025)

  • 제목: Real-Time Model Predictive Control of Nonlinear Coupled Joints Using MPPI: Application to Humanoid Ankle Joints
  • 저자: Gunoo Park , Jaewan Bak, Yunsoo Seo, Euncheol Im, Hoseok LEE, Jongbok Lee, Nicolas Mansard, Jongwon Lee, Yisoo Lee^\dagger

  • 저널: International Conference on Robotics & Automation (2026 June 6.1-6.5)

  • 제목: REIST: A Novel Robotic Wrist with Reversed-Envelope Characteristics for Manipulation in Confined Spaces
  • 저자: Yunseong Na, Euncheol Im, Sujin Lee, Yisoo Lee, Sungwook Yang, Yonghwan Oh, Yong Seok Ihn^\dagger
  • 저널: Transaction on Mechatronics (2026)
